columns.column_name: Previous local therapy - N (%) | Prostatectomy | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm who received prostatectomy as a previous local therapy are not reported. Table 1 provides a general category "Metastases after treatment for local disease, n (%))" but does not specify the type of local therapy.

columns.column_name: Previous local therapy - N (%) | Orchiectomy | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm who received orchiectomy as a previous local therapy are not reported. The "Patients and methods" section on page 2 mentions orchiectomy as part of the ADT treatment given in the trial, not as a previous local therapy. Table 1 does not list orchiectomy as a previous local therapy.
